generated_oml:
instance BuildingAsset : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building or infrastructure asset within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, characterized by static models integrated with real-time operational data for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the building lifecycle"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Modeling (BIM) representation with geometric and semantic data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance ModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) process for transforming enriched BIM models into structured representations and generating deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using data-driven insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting system behavior and maintenance needs"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of building infrastructure performance and resource usage"
    DTDFVocab:provides InfrastructureOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interfaces for facility managers to monitor and control operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInterface
]

instance CustomAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom analytics services integrated via modular extension points for actionable insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionableInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data-driven insights for building operations monitoring"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted system behavior and potential issues from predictive analytics"
]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for building infrastructure efficiency"
]

instance VisualizationInterface : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for Facility Managers to monitor and control operations"
]

instance ActionableInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights generated by custom analytics services"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and leverages Unreal Engine for rich, interactive visualization, featuring standardized extension points to enable modular, service-oriented DT platforms."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle stages commence with device modeling in BIM environment where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish a unified semantic foundation. This is followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles for extracting structured representations and automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts. The runtime phase includes real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular architecture enabling evolution through custom services and analytics integration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment framework with modular architecture and standardized extension points enables scalable integration of custom services; runtime configuration management allows dynamic adjustments without full redeployment, supporting scalability from individual components to enterprise-wide systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework implements standardized extension points within its modular architecture to ensure interoperability and seamless integration of custom services and analytics. However, no specific industry standards (e.g., ISO, IFC) or compliance frameworks are explicitly referenced in the document."
]
